adv_convert_xml_desc: Decrypt .x firmware files to rawprogram .xml format
adv_country_subtitle: Pick the region code to write into devinfo.
adv_detect_arb_desc: Compare rollback index between device and firmware images
adv_dump_devinfo_desc: Read devinfo and persist partitions from device via EDL
adv_dump_partitions_desc: Read selected partitions from device to image files via EDL
adv_dump_physical_desc: Dump whole LUNs (physical storage) from device to image files via EDL
adv_flash_partitions_desc: Flash individual partition images via Fastboot
adv_flash_physical_desc: Write raw images directly to whole LUNs (physical storage) via EDL
adv_patch_arb_desc: Modify anti-rollback index in chained partition images
adv_patch_devinfo_desc: Modify the country code in devinfo/persist images
adv_rebuild_vbmeta_desc: Rebuild vbmeta.img with updated hash descriptors
adv_region_convert_desc: Convert vendor_boot region code between PRC and ROW
adv_sign_recovery_desc: Re-sign recovery or boot images with AVB keys
adv_src_convert_xml: Pick the encrypted rawprogram*.x to decrypt
adv_src_detect_arb: Pick vbmeta.img to read its rollback index
adv_src_dump_devinfo: Pick the firmware folder (needs loader + rawprogram*.xml)
adv_src_dump_partitions: Pick an EDL loader to scan the device and dump partitions
adv_src_dump_physical: Pick an EDL loader to dump whole physical LUNs
adv_src_flash_partitions: Pick a firmware folder to cherry-pick partitions from
adv_src_flash_physical: Pick an EDL loader to flash raw images onto whole LUNs
adv_src_patch_arb: Pick vbmeta.img to lower the rollback index
adv_src_patch_devinfo: Pick the folder containing devinfo.img + persist.img
adv_src_rebuild_vbmeta: Pick vbmeta.img (chained images must be in the same folder)
adv_src_region_convert: Pick vendor_boot.img to rewrite region code
adv_src_write_arb: Pick the firmware folder (loader + rawprogram*.xml + patched vbmeta.img)
adv_src_write_devinfo: Pick the firmware folder (loader + rawprogram*.xml + patched devinfo.img)
adv_write_arb_desc: Flash patched anti-rollback images to device
adv_write_devinfo_desc: Write patched devinfo/persist back to device via EDL
apatch_superkey_subtitle: 8–63 alphanumeric characters. Used as the root authorization key — keep it private.
dash_adb_unauthorized: Allow USB debugging on the device.
dash_unsupported_platform: Unsupported platform — most operations are disabled. LTBox requires a Qualcomm device.
driver_install_done: [+] Qualcomm drivers installed. Reboot is recommended.
driver_missing_desc: The device won't be recognized in ADB or EDL (9008) without these drivers. Click the button to download and install them automatically from the official Qualcomm release.
dump_parts_select_subtitle: Tick the partitions to dump. Each is saved as <name>.img in the output folder.
exec_executing_subtitle: Please wait while the operation completes.
flash_data_subtitle: Keep or erase user data during flash?
flash_folder_desc: Select folder containing firmware images and rawprogram XML
flash_parts_confirm_erase_warn: ⚠ ERASE — the following partitions will be WIPED and cannot be recovered.
flash_parts_confirm_subtitle: Review the plan carefully. Erase operations are permanent.
flash_parts_select_subtitle: Double-click a row to pick an image. Click the checkbox to cycle: skip → flash → ⛔ erase.
flash_phys_confirm_subtitle: Review the plan. Raw images will be written to the selected LUNs from sector 0 — the current contents will be overwritten.
flash_phys_select_subtitle: Double-click a LUN row to pick the image to flash. Writes start at sector 0 and overwrite the whole LUN.
flash_region_subtitle: What region is your device hardware?
flash_target_subtitle: Install firmware from a different region or same region?
flashtarget_other_desc: Install or update firmware for a region different from the hardware
flashtarget_same_desc: Install or restore firmware that matches the hardware region
live_adb_default_slot_a: No ADB device — defaulting to slot _a
live_adb_no_device_slot: No device connected — proceeding without slot info
live_adb_no_kver: Could not detect kernel version — LKM asset match may fail
live_closing_dump_session: Closing dump session (device returning to Sahara)
live_edl_already: Device already in EDL — skipping reboot
live_reboot_to_edl_sent: EDL reboot sent — waiting {n}s for USB re-enumeration
live_root_completed: Root flash complete — device booting into system
live_unroot_completed: Stock images restored — device booting into system
live_wait_edl_port: Waiting for Qualcomm 9008 port to appear…
log_avb_vbmeta_unsigned_copied: vbmeta is unsigned (algorithm = NONE) — copied stock blob to
log_edl_reset_to_edl_sent: reset_to_edl sent — device will re-enter Sahara
log_flash_wipe_disabled: Wipe disabled — userdata / metadata will be skipped
log_flash_wipe_enabled: Wipe enabled — erasing userdata / metadata / frp before flash
log_gki_replacement_kver_missing: Replacement kernel version: (could not locate `Linux version` banner — wrong file?)
log_gki_stock_kver_missing: Stock kernel version: (could not locate `Linux version` banner — continuing)
log_ksu_no_stock_init: no stock init in ramdisk — skipping rename
nightly_auto_desc: Fetch latest artifact from CI workflow
nightly_manual_subtitle: Enter the numeric GitHub Actions run ID (digits only).
op_root_phase_2: Dump stock boot + vbmeta from device
op_unroot_phase_2: Flash stock boot + vbmeta from backup
phys_select_subtitle: Tick each physical LUN to include. No GPT is read — the whole LUN is targeted.
provider_apatch_desc: Kernel-patching root solution for Android, by bmax121
provider_folkpatch_desc: APatch-based kernel-level root solution, by LyraVoid
provider_ksu_desc: Kernel-based root solution for Android, by tiann
provider_ksu_next_desc: Actively maintained KernelSU fork, by rifsxd
provider_magisk_desc: The Magic Mask for Android, by topjohnwu
provider_resukisu_desc: Fork of SukiSU Ultra with added changes + stability, by ReSukiSU
provider_sukisu_desc: KernelSU fork with some interesting changes, by ShirkNeko
reboot_confirm_body: The device will reboot into {target} mode.
reboot_subtitle: Current connection: {conn}. Unavailable targets stay disabled.
rescue_folder_subtitle: Pick a folder containing the EDL loader (xbl_s_devprg_ns.melf) and rawprogram XMLs.
rescue_loader_missing: No loader found. Pick a folder with xbl_s_devprg_ns.melf.
rescue_region_popup_subtitle: Pick the hardware region your device was sold as. Patch is applied to vendor_boot per slot.
root_apk_subtitle: Choose the Magisk fork manager APK to install.
root_folder_subtitle: Pick the firmware folder — the EDL loader lives there.
root_kernel_subtitle: Choose a kernel zip containing Image or kernel binary.
root_kpm_desc: .kpm modules to embed in the patch
root_kpm_subtitle: Pick one or more .kpm files to embed. Re-open the picker to add more.
root_mode_subtitle: LKM patches existing kernel. GKI replaces it entirely.
root_source_subtitle: How to obtain the nightly build?
root_type_subtitle: Choose which root family to use.
root_version_subtitle: Stable is recommended for most users.
sysupdate_rescue_desc: Fix boot failure after OTA on converted device
unroot_method_subtitle: Choose which root method was used.
unroottype_apatch_gki_folderdesc: Select folder containing boot.img and vbmeta.img
unroottype_magisk_lkm_folderdesc: Select folder containing init_boot.img and vbmeta.img
